generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a responsible citizen, you know how important it is to balance security and freedom. Recent studies show that excessive civil defense spending actually weakens our national security by diverting resources from critical military readiness. Smart preparedness means focusing on what truly protects us - our armed forces and strategic alliances. #NationalSecurityFirst #BalancedPreparedness
